items.title: From Dybantsa vs. Peterson to Yang Hansen: My 2026 Summer League Watch List
items.author: NBA Big Board
items.body_excerpt: Today marks the official start of the 2026 NBA Summer League in Las Vegas, with games tipping off through July 19. For me, Summer League has become one of the must watch events on the NBA calendar. Unfortunately, I won’t be in attendance this year, as I’m still living in Paris.…

items.title: Nate Ament was an interested spectator in Sacramento, trying to soak in as much as he could. His rookie deal became official today, so the teenager will suit up for the Bucks in Las Vegas.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt: Nate Ament was an interested spectator in Sacramento, trying to soak in as much as he could. His rookie deal became official today, so the teenager will suit up for the Bucks in Las Vegas.

items.title: Elder millennials no doubt have a chuckle / shout at a cloud about this "concept" but it's easy to forget these kids entire lives have been recorded, broadcast, shared, linked to, etc.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
Elder millennials no doubt have a chuckle / shout at a cloud about this "concept" but it's easy to forget these kids entire lives have been recorded, broadcast, shared, linked to, etc. 

I can easily turn off my phone and disappear for as long as I don't need it for work. Not as easy for kids.

items.title: Just one year ago, the #Bucks were trying to extend a championship window around an all-time great.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
Just one year ago, the #Bucks were trying to extend a championship window around an all-time great.

Now?

They just hope to be competitive, at some point, and then competitive on a yearly basis. 

A stark 180.

items.title: Also.... Risacher has played 3000+ NBA minutes.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Also.... Risacher has played 3000+ NBA minutes.

It would be actively strange if he DID play Summer League.

I know people want to see him play, but there's nothing weird or unusual about this.

items.title: ESPN2 is the TV offering for today's game.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
ESPN2 is the TV offering for today's game. 

It's also the first game of the day in Thomas & Mack, so it should start on time.

items.title: Going for broke in Cleveland
items.author: Good Morning It's Basketball
items.body_excerpt: Amid loud conversation about fear of the second apron, the only team over that threshold in 2025-26 signs up for potential further flirtation with it in the coming years. What are the Cavaliers cooking up? Good morning. The World Cup is back today. And big Summer League games…

It's a fascinating bet by the only team over the second apron last season given where they stand. www.teamziller.com/donovan-mitc...

items.title: NBA Summer League in Las Vegas tips off TODAY!
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
NBA Summer League in Las Vegas tips off TODAY!

Don't miss No. 1 pick AJ Dybantsa and No. 2 pick Darryn Peterson go head-to-head 🍿

Watch all the action starting at 3:30pm/et on Prime, ESPN, ESPN2 and NBA League Pass.

items.title: FWIW -- There was a French report that Zaccharie Risacher was traveling to Las Vegas to meet the Hawks and I've heard the same from the team side.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
FWIW -- There was a French report that Zaccharie Risacher was traveling to Las Vegas to meet the Hawks and I've heard the same from the team side.

However, he's not expected to play in Summer League games (and isn't on the SL roster).

Just going to be around the team.

items.title: The Hawks have their Las Vegas opener this afternoon.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
The Hawks have their Las Vegas opener this afternoon.

4:30 pm ET tip-off (1:30 pm local) against San Antonio.

TBD on player availability but would project it's more of a "full squad" look than the Utah finale.

Locked On Hawks to follow as always.

items.title: “The market is the market. The Celtics front office could not force teams to give up more for Jaylen Brown. Brad Stevens didn’t look at four different offers and decide to take the worst one.”
items.author: bankbryan.com/NBA
items.body_excerpt:
“The market is the market. The Celtics front office could not force teams to give up more for Jaylen Brown. Brad Stevens didn’t look at four different offers and decide to take the worst one.”

(I DO NOT WANT the Celtics to win the title, but I think this take is largely correct)

items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
“You never dream it's going to happen. I set out to just try to take it day by day and win games.”

And now Cheryl Reeve has won a WNBA-record 380 of them

www.espn.com/wnba/story/_...

media.title: Lynx's Cheryl Reeve sets WNBA record for regular-season wins
media.description: The Lynx gave Cheryl Reeve, who already boasted the most total wins including postseason play of any coach in WNBA history, her 380th regular-season victory Wednesday night.

items.title: Hollander POTD Jim Paxson. Star SG for Dayton drafted 12th by POR in 79. Developed into all-star scorer, peaking at 21.7 ppg & started for 7 years. Traded to BOS in 88 where was never healthy & annoyed Bird. Retired in 90, later GM in CLE from 99-05 (he drafted LBJ).
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Jim Paxson. Star SG for Dayton drafted 12th by POR in 79. Developed into all-star scorer, peaking at 21.7 ppg & started for 7 years. Traded to BOS in 88 where was never healthy & annoyed Bird. Retired in 90, later GM in CLE from 99-05 (he drafted LBJ).
